chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1823 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 01.12.2016. Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Sher Muhammad Legahri, State Counsel a/w SIP Sohail Sarwar o/b of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Hadi Shah o/b of SHO Market. = Today, the comments have been filed on behalf of the official respondents in which they have stated that police officials are discharging their duties strictly in accordance with law and have not caused any harassment to the petitioners and will provide protection whenever they are approached with such a request. The learned State Counsel further confirms as well as also mentioned in the parawise comments that till date no FIR has been registered by the private respondents against the petitioners. This petition is disposed of in view of the above observations and with the directions that the official respondents including the respondent No.2-SSP Karachi Central will provide legal protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a request, but strictly in accordance with law. Copy of this order be provided to the learned State Counsel as well as communicated to respondents No.1 & 2-Home Secretary Sindh and SSP Karachi Central respectively for necessary action in this regard. JUDGE Shahid
